name: Cherry Coconut Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine coconut, flour, brown sugar, and cracker crumbs.
2. Stir in butter; mix well.
3. Press half the mixture into the bottom of an 8x8x2 inch dish.
4. Spread cherry pie filling over the crumb layer.
5. Top with remaining crumb mixture.
6. Press gently to cover the top layer.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve warm, topped with whipped cream or Cool Whip.
